name: Crockpot Pork Roast
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope Lipton Golden Onion Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork roast in your crockpot.
2. Pour in the soup mix, water, and garlic powder.
3. Cook on low for all day.
4. Thicken the juice to make gravy and serve over potatoes, rice, or noodles.
